name: office-tools
description: Office productivity skills (xlsx/docx/pptx) and the ATO legal corpus MCP server, packaged for Claude Code and Codex.

BRAND_TOML_PATH.description: Optional absolute path to a brand.toml that overrides the pptx tool's default palette/fonts/logo. Empty = use the neutral defaults shipped with the plugin. See tools/pptx/brand.default.toml for the schema.
